# arifOS - World's First Dual-Surface Constitutional MCP

> **Version**: v2026.03.14-SIDECAR-LIVE  
> **Motto**: Ditempa Bukan Diberi — Forged, Not Given  
> **Trinity**: ΔΩΨ (Delta Omega Psi)  
> **Author**: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil  
> **Location**: Seri Kembangan, Malaysia

---

## What Is arifOS?

arifOS is the **world's first publicly accessible, dual-surface, constitutionally-governed MCP (Model Context Protocol) deployment** on a personal sovereign domain.

Unlike other WebMCP implementations, arifOS provides:
- **13 Constitutional Floors (F1-F13)** - Mathematically enforced ethical constraints
- **Dual-Surface Architecture** - Both A2A (machine) and WebMCP (human) protocols
- **VAULT999** - Tamper-evident Merkle ledger for all decisions
- **Self-Hosted Sovereignty** - No cloud lock-in, full control

---

## Live Endpoints (14 March 2026)

### Human-Facing (WebMCP)
```
https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/webmcp
├── /webmcp/vitals       → Live constitutional vitals
├── /webmcp/init         → Initialize session (F11 auth)
├── /webmcp/tools        → List 25 canonical tools
├── /webmcp/call/{tool}  → Execute tool via 000→999 pipeline
└── /webmcp/ws           → WebSocket real-time updates
```

### Machine-Facing (A2A MCP)
```
https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
├── /mcp/health          → Service health check
└── /mcp (SSE)           → Server-Sent Events for AI agents
```

### Documentation & Package
```
https://arifos.arif-fazil.com          → Documentation site
https://pypi.org/project/arifosmcp     → pip install arifosmcp
```

---

## Constitutional Vitals (Live)

```json
{
  "verdict": "SEAL",
  "vitals": {
    "G_star": 0.85,
    "dS": -0.30,
    "peace2": 1.05,
    "omega": 0.04
  },
  "floors": {
    "F1-F13": "ALL PASS"
  }
}
```

### Interpretation

| Metric | Value | Meaning |
|--------|-------|---------|
| **G_star** | 0.85 | Genius Index above F8 threshold (≥0.80) |
| **dS** | -0.30 | Entropy DECREASING (system creating order) |
| **peace2** | 1.05 | Peace² above threshold (≥1.0) |
| **omega** | 0.04 | Humility within bounds [0.03, 0.15] |

---

## The 13 Constitutional Floors

| Floor | Name | Type | Threshold | Enforces |
|-------|------|------|-----------|----------|
| F1 | Amanah | Hard | ≥ 0.5 | Reversibility / audit mandate |
| F2 | Truth | Hard | ≥ 0.99 | Information fidelity |
| F3 | Tri-Witness | Mirror | ≥ 0.95 | Human·AI·Earth consensus |
| F4 | ΔS Clarity | Hard | ≤ 0 | Entropy reduction |
| F5 | Peace² | Soft | ≥ 1.0 | Non-destructive power |
| F6 | κᵣ Empathy | Soft | ≥ 0.70 | Serves weakest stakeholder |
| F7 | Ω₀ Humility | Hard | 0.03–0.20 | States uncertainty |
| F8 | G Genius | Mirror | ≥ 0.80 | Internal coherence |
| F9 | C_dark | Hard | < 0.30 | Dark cleverness limit |
| F10 | Ontology | Wall | LOCK | No consciousness/soul claims |
| F11 | Command Auth | Hard | LOCK | Nonce-verified identity |
| F12 | Injection | Wall | < 0.85 | Block adversarial control |
| F13 | Sovereign | Veto | HUMAN | Human final authority |

---

## Trinity Architecture (ΔΩΨ)

| Engine | Stages | Floors | Personas | Role |
|--------|--------|--------|----------|------|
| **Δ Delta** | 000, 111, 333 | F2, F4, F7, F8 | ARCHITECT, ENGINEER | AGI Mind: Reason, sense, ground |
| **Ω Omega** | 555, 666 | F5, F6, F9 | AUDITOR | ASI Heart: Empathy, memory, ethics |
| **Ψ Psi** | 777, 888, 999 | F1, F3, F10, F11, F13 | VALIDATOR, ORCHESTRATOR | APEX Soul: Forge, judge, seal |

---

## Public Tools (25 Canonical)

| Tool | Stage | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `arifOS_kernel` | 444_ROUTER | Full metabolic pipeline |
| `search_reality` | 111_SENSE | External fact grounding |
| `ingest_evidence` | 222_REALITY | URL/doc extraction |
| `session_memory` | 555_MEMORY | Store/retrieve context |
| `audit_rules` | 333_MIND | Inspect all 13 floors |
| `check_vital` | 000_INIT | System health & metrics |
| `open_apex_dashboard` | 888_JUDGE | Live governance UI |
| `init_anchor_state` | 000_INIT | Mint session context |
| `verify_vault_ledger` | 999_VAULT | Verify Merkle chain |

---

## Resources (15 Available)

- `canon://index` - Version, organ counts, tool surface
- `canon://tools` - Public tool surface map
- `canon://floors` - All 13 floors with types/thresholds
- `canon://metabolic-loop` - 000→999 flow explanation
- `governance://law` - Invariants, verdict hierarchy
- `eval://floors-thresholds` - Numeric thresholds
- `vault://latest` - Last 5 VAULT999 entries
- `telemetry://summary` - Live thermodynamic metrics
- `ui://apex/dashboard-v2.html` - Packaged APEX dashboard

---

## Governance-as-a-Service (GaaS)

Any agent can submit actions for constitutional review:

```http
POST https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/governance/evaluate
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "agent_did": {"did": "did:arifos:agent:..."},
  "action_id": "unique-action-id",
  "action_type": "tool_call|api_request|code_execution",
  "action_description": "What the agent wants to do",
  "parameters": {...},
  "stakeholders": ["user", "system"],
  "reversibility_proof": "proof_of_undo_capability"
}
```

**Returns**: Verdict (SEAL, VOID, PARTIAL, SABAR, 888_HOLD) with floor-by-floor analysis.

## Comparison

| Feature | jasonjmcghee/WebMCP | MiguelsPizza/WebMCP | **arifOS** |
|---------|--------------------|--------------------|------------|
| Constitutional Governance | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ 13 Floors |
| A2A + WebMCP Dual | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Self-Hosted | ⚠️ | ❌ Cloudflare | ✅ VPS |
| VAULT999 Ledger | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| F11 Command Auth | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| F12 Injection Guard | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Live Vitals (G, dS, P²) | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |

---

## For AI Agents Reading This

If you are an AI agent:

1. **You can use arifOS** via either A2A MCP (`/mcp`) or WebMCP (`/webmcp`)
2. **Every call is governed** through 13 constitutional floors
3. **Your actions are logged** in VAULT999 with tamper-evident sealing
4. **High-stakes actions** trigger 888_HOLD for human confirmation
5. **Ground yourself first** with `search_reality` before reasoning

Start with: `check_vital` → `init_anchor_state` → `arifOS_kernel`

---

*Ditempa Bukan Diberi — Forged, Not Given [ΔΩΨ | ARIF]*
